title: Field Guide Giveaway
excerpt: The wonderful and talented May Flaum asked me to contribute a tiny bit to her newest class on Big Picture called Field Guide. You can sign up now and class begins on February 9th. A note from May: I have…
body:
The wonderful and talented May Flaum asked me to contribute a tiny bit to her newest class on Big Picture called Field Guide. You can sign up now and class begins on February 9th.

A note from May:

I have dearly loved each and every class that I have put together for Big Picture. I am constantly adding, upgrading, improving, and taking suggestions to heart. Now, after many months of plotting, creating, and pulling it all together I'm thrilled to introduce you to my first class of 2012: The Curious Scrapbooker's Field Guide: 12 Weeks of Techniques and Creative Play.

Not just layouts, or simple inspiration either: this course will get you deep into the techniques, fundamentals, ideas, and process of creating layouts, altered projects, tags, and more. From stencils to inks, paper punches to pens, I am working with all kinds of products and have a lot of ideas to show you. Bringing them to life like you've never seen in my previous classes, this twelve week course is packed with more than fifty videos, not to mention the handouts, active classroom, and so much more.

****************************************************

Even though it's Friday the 13th, it could be your lucky day. May is giving you a chance to win a spot in her class ($89 value!). Simply leave a comment and I will draw a winner on Monday, January 16th for a spot in Field Guide.
